001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.scheduler;
002
003/**
004 * Represents a task that can be scheduled
005 */
006public abstract class Task implements Runnable {
007    final int delay;
008    final boolean repeat;
009
010    boolean cancelled = false;
011    int tick;
012
013    /**
014     * Create a new task.
015     *
016     * @param delay Delay (in ticks) before task runs
017     */
018    public Task(int delay) {
019        this(delay, false);
020    }
021
022    /**
023     * Create a new task.
024     *
025     * @param delay  Delay (in ticks) before task runs
026     * @param repeat Whether task should start again after running
027     */
028    public Task(int delay, boolean repeat) {
029        this.delay = delay;
030        this.repeat = repeat;
031    }
032
033    /**
034     * Cancel the task from running.
035     */
036    public void cancel() {
037        this.cancelled = true;
038    }
039
040    /**
041     * Check if task is cancelled.
042     *
043     * @return {@code true} is cancelled, otherwise {@code false}
044     */
045    public boolean cancelled() {
046        return this.cancelled;
047    }
048}
